name: Bloodstone
description: The Bloodstone's bright ruby color is unmistakable on the battlefield, as the owner seems to have infinite vitality and spirit.

abilities.name: Bloodpact
abilities.description: Greatly increases the passive spell lifesteal for a while. Cooldown: 30. Duration: 5.

abilities.name: Spell Weakness Aura
abilities.description: Weakens nearby enemies by applying a debuff that amplifies any spell damage they take. Radius: 1200. Spell Damage Amp: 12%.
